creator: durian@shadetreesoftware.com
text:
Please commit this patch and assign maintainership to Thomas Zande.  =
I've been using Eagle under OS X recently and have been neglecting this =
port.  Thomas will be a better maintainer.

mike

On Oct 2, 2010, at 7:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of cad/linux-eagle5,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/151153 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/151153
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
